_comment: Append a new entry before tagging a release. Keep entries newest-first.

entries.title: Field help tooltips and design Lexicon
highlights: Canonical lexicon with GDD, core loop, enrichment, and per-schema field definitions
Help tooltips on detail pages, index filters, and analytics; browse at /docs/lexicon

sections.heading: Added
items: data/source/lexicon/lexicon.json exported as /api/v1/lexicon.json
HelpTooltip and FieldLabel components with SectionHeading helpKey support
Lexicon page with search and category navigation
scripts/lint_lexicon and scripts/build_lexicon for lexicon maintenance

entries.title: Repo hygiene: local-only enrichment workflow
highlights: Cohort patch JSON and bulk generator scripts are gitignored; canonical data lives in library/ and maps/
CI rejects accidentally committed local-only enrichment assets

sections.heading: Changed
items: Enrichment cohort files under enrichment/cohorts/ are local-only (.gitkeep placeholder in repo)
Bulk generate_*.py and analyze_*.py scripts removed from version control
Contributor docs and Contribute page describe apply_enrichment → PR merged catalogs workflow
Repository history squashed to a single release commit

entries.title: Full catalog enrichment and genre expansion
highlights: Apply full-catalog, skills, and catalog-expansion cohorts across 1401 maps and 25 design skills
Genre recipe pages show the same enriched sections as game maps (GDD outline, mechanics, variables, menus)

sections.heading: Added
items: Seven new enrichment cohorts: full-catalog v1.6.0–v1.6.4, skills v1.7.0, catalog-expansion v1.8.0
Twelve new genre recipe maps (battle royale, MOBA, FPS, survival crafting, and others)
apply_enrichment skills_add and maps_add patch operations
MapDetailSections shared component for game and genre detail pages
Catalog gap analysis and cohort generator scripts

sections.heading: Changed
items: Mechanics, variables, UI menus, and maps enriched to 100% cohort coverage
Variable and UI menu detail pages show when_to_avoid design guidance

entries.title: Full library enrichment and pedagogy coverage
highlights: Apply expansion, gap-fill, and pedagogy cohorts across mechanics, variables, menus, skills, and maps
Detail pages show examples, GDD outlines, and design guidance for all entity types

sections.heading: Added
items: Eight enrichment cohorts from pilot through pedagogy v1.5.1
generate_pedagogy_cohort.py and generate_gap_fill_cohort.py helpers
apply_enrichment skills catalog support and tests
Frontend sections for mechanic examples, map GDD outlines, variable/menu/skill design guidance

entries.title: Fix direct-link 404s on GitHub Pages
highlights: Add 404.html SPA fallback and .nojekyll for GitHub Pages routing
Fix favicon base path for project-site deployment

sections.heading: Fixed
items: Direct URLs like /explore/analytics now load instead of GitHub 404
generate-seo writes 404.html (SPA shell) and .nojekyll after prerender

entries.title: SEO, AEO, GEO, and Discord embed support
highlights: Build-time prerendered Open Graph HTML for all detail routes
Client-side meta tags and JSON-LD via react-helmet-async
sitemap.xml, robots.txt, llms.txt, and section share deep links

sections.heading: Added
items: cmd/generate-seo prerenders OG/Twitter meta for ~1,700 routes after Vite build
site/src/seo module with PageMeta, JSON-LD builders, and usePageMeta hook
ShareSectionLink component and hash scroll on detail pages
Default og-default.png social preview image
X (@BlaziumGames) links in site header, footer, and README

entries.title: Analytics resilience and enrichment status UI
highlights: Fix analytics page crash on stale API payloads
Unified enrichment status chips across catalog list pages
Route error fallback with retry on analytics

sections.heading: Fixed
items: Analytics page no longer crashes when mechanic_stats or skill_stats are missing from cached analytics.json
Mechanics and skills pages show human-readable needs info status with warning chips
Enrichment filters treat missing API status as needs_info consistently

sections.heading: Added
items: normalizeAnalyticsSnapshot helper with legacy payload defaults
EnrichmentStatusChip shared component
Analytics fetch error state with retry and raw JSON link
Route errorElement fallback on /explore/analytics

entries.title: Enrichment infrastructure and issue-driven mechanic backfill
highlights: Mechanic enrichment_status on API and analytics dashboard
Enrichment cohort patch workflow with documented folder layout
WebMCP list-skills and get-skill tools
GitHub enrich-mechanic issue template

sections.heading: Added
items: Enrichment patches under data/source/enrichment/cohorts/ with README and apply_enrichment script
Mechanic and skill enrichment stats in analytics.json and /explore/analytics
Mechanics index enrichment_status field
GitHub issue template: enrich-mechanic.yml
WebMCP tools: list-skills, get-skill; search-index skill type filter

sections.heading: Site
items: Mechanics page enrichment filter and status column
Mechanic detail CTA links to enrich-mechanic issue template
Home hero shows mechanic enrichment percentage
Contribute page documents mechanic enrichment workflow

sections.heading: Fixed
items: Pilot cohort re-applied with design_exercises on all 10 enriched mechanics

entries.title: Skills catalog and design pedagogy enrichment
highlights: 15 design skills catalog
Mechanic schema 1.3 with learning objectives and design exercises
Pilot enrichment for 10 mechanics and 5 curated maps
Discord and GitHub community links on site

sections.heading: Added
items: Design skills catalog (`library/skills.json`) with categories: motor, cognitive, strategic, social, creative
API: GET /api/v1/skills/index.json and /skills/{slug}.json
Index: skill-to-mechanics.json
Mechanic schema 1.3: learning_objectives, design_exercises, skills_developed
Variable and UI menu schema 1.1: agent_context for GDD prompts
Gameplay maps: optional skill_slugs[] linked to skills catalog
Site: /skills list and detail pages; design guidance on mechanic pages

sections.heading: Enriched
items: 10 pilot mechanics with design_guidance, agent_context, and exercises
5 pilot maps with structured skill_slugs
3 variables and 2 UI menus with agent_context

sections.heading: Site
items: Prominent GitHub and Discord community links in header, home, footer, and contribute page

sections.heading: API
items: catalog.json skill_count field
Release zips: design-index-api-1.1.0.zip and design-index-formats-1.1.0.zip

entries.title: Game Design Index — initial release
highlights: 1389 gameplay maps
248 reusable mechanics
44 game variables and 23 UI menus
16 genre recipes
GitHub Pages site, static JSON API, and WebMCP tools

sections.heading: Added
items: Game Design Index: open MIT-licensed corpus of gameplay maps, mechanics, variables, and UI menus
Mechanics library schema 1.2 with 248 entries
Gameplay maps for games and genre recipes
Variables catalog with categories, scopes, and enrichment tracking
UI menus catalog with menu types, layers, and flow edges
Static JSON API export pipeline with multi-format release zips
Browse site: games, mechanics, genres, variables, UI menus, co-occurrence, analytics, changelog
WebMCP query tools for AI agents
GitHub issue templates for contributions

sections.heading: API
items: GET /api/v1/catalog.json, analytics.json, changelog.json
GET /api/v1/maps/, mechanics/, genres/, variables/, ui-menus/
Release zips: design-index-api-1.0.0.zip and design-index-formats-1.0.0.zip

sections.heading: Site
items: Home page with corpus stats and curated highlights
Co-occurrence explorer and analytics dashboard
API and WebMCP documentation pages
ExportDropdown for per-entity JSON/MD/YAML/XML/TXT
